title: Mythocraft - Mythology in Minecraft
description: Artifacts and Creatures from Greek Mythology
body:
# Mythocraft ## Short Description Mythocraft brings objects and creatures from (greek) mythology into the game for you to explore, collect, use and battle with. ![Naturally generated greek temple structure with a nemean lion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gcOdblwO/images/0bbd49aefe7d921eac626d8e4ae46159de5c9fc9.png) ## Requirements This mod requires [LMCommonCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/lmcc), the Fabric version additionally requires [FabricAPI](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api). ## Current Features
Structures - Greek Temple, generating in (Snowy-)Plains and Desert biomes, spawns the Nemean Lion and provides loot chests with mod items
Entities - Satyr, a friendly creature found in wooded biomes - Pegasus, a horse-like creature with wings - Nemean Lion, a lion with very resistant pelt, which can drop once killed, spawns around greek temples
Armor & Weapons - Nemean Coat, made from nemean lion pelts and a string, provides good protection against attacks - Helm of Hades, the helm of the god of the underworld, can make the wearer invisible (monsters ignore you, unless you start attacking them)
Items & Resources - Ambrosia, food of the gods, fully fills your hunger and saturation and provides 10 seconds of regeneration when eaten - Pelt of the Nemean Lion, may drop when killing a nemean lion, used to craft the Nemean Coat
